---
title: "MicW2Graph: Building a knowledge graph of the wastewater treatment microbiome and its biological context"
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the Conference on Complex Systems 2025 at Siena, Italy.
date: "2025-09-01"
image: CCS2025.png
categories:
  - 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
  - 🦠Microbiology
  - 🧫Omics
  - 🕸️Network science
  - ⛃🕸️Knowledge graphs
  - 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event][event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)][slides]{.btn target=_blank} 

You can find more details about this project [here][micw2graph]. 

[micw2graph]: https://sayalaruano.github.io/projects/MicW2Graph/
[event]: https://ccs25.cssociety.org/
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16965571
